svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1" scale="1" border="30"> <diagram id="1" name="Enterprise Networking Reference Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1211" dy="1192" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" background="#FFFFFF" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Corporate Network / On-Premises" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="350" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jetSize=auto;fontSize=11;" target="20" value="ExpressRoute / VPN"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Hub VNet" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="800" x="100" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" parent="20" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fce5cd;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Azure Firewall" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="30" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="22" parent="20" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fce5cd;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="ExpressRoute
Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="220" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="23" parent="20" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fce5cd;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Private DNS
Zones" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="420" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="24" parent="20" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fce5cd;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="VPN Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="620" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" edge="1" parent="1" source="20" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jetSize=auto;fontSize=11;" target="40" value="VNet Peering"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="40" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Spoke VNet (AI Workloads)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="800" x="100" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="41" parent="40" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Application
Workloads" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="30" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="42" parent="40" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Container
Environments" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="220" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="43" parent="40" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Private
Endpoints" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="420" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="44" parent="40" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Data Services" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="620" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="50" edge="1" parent="1" source="43" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;fontColor=#9673a6;" target="60" value="Private Link"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="60" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=12 12;" value="Microsoft-Managed Infrastructure" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="250" width="800" x="100" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="61" parent="60" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="Foundry Resource" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="370" x="30" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="62" parent="61" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" value="Project A" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="105" x="15" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="63" parent="61" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" value="Project B" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="105" x="130" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="64" parent="61" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" value="Project C" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="105" x="245" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="65" parent="61" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#b3d1ff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;" value="Model Inference (Microsoft-managed compute)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="340" x="15" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="66" parent="60" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" value="Azure
OpenAI" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="80" x="430" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="67" parent="60" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" value="Azure
Storage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="80" x="525" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="68" parent="60" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" value="Azure AI
Search" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="80" x="620" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="69" parent="60" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" value="Azure
Key Vault" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="80" x="700" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="70" parent="60" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#666666;" value="Supporting Services (Private Endpoint targets)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="350" x="430" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="71" parent="60" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;size=14;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="Model compute runs HERE — not inside your VNet" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="280" x="100" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
